expectations.evidence: Clear 'Step 1: Constraint Summary' identifying prefix lookup as primary op, read-heavy workload, <50ms hard constraint, memory budget
Full comparison table: Trie vs Sorted Array+Binary Search vs Hash Map across 8 criteria
Detailed analysis: O(N*L) build, O(m+K) query for basic, O(S) worst case for ranked variant, space analysis with practical estimates
Two pseudocode variants: basic DFS collection and ranked top-K with min-heap
Table of 8 edge cases: empty prefix, single char, no matches, exact match, case sensitivity, unicode, long strings, duplicates, concurrent updates
Dedicated Python (pygtrie, bisect, heapq, sortedcontainers), Rust (BTreeMap, fst, trie-rs, arena), TypeScript (Map-based, debounce, Web Workers) sections
